productDisplayName: Fila Men DLS Bound White Sports Shoes
description: fila's fan following will love this DLS Bound shoe with its high ankle support and mid-top styling. With a funky futuristic feel, these shoes are as tough as they are in-vogue. We recommend that you wear this pair with skinny denims rolled up to the ankle for maximum impact!UpperSyntehtic upper with mesh inlays and mid-top stylingCentral lace upsPadded tongueHeavily padded mesh innerPadded footbedReinforced overlay at the heel collarMidsoleThick rubber midsole with V3 dynamic landing system at the heelOutsoleAggressive patterns and deep flex grooves all over the outsoleShoe careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
